name: RSA TEAM
tagline: Built on pace, pressure and a bit of attitude.
about: RSA TEAM is a club that plays on the front foot. Formed in 2024, we built a young, fearless squad around quick transitions and relentless pressing. Every match is an opportunity to show what we are made of — a tight-knit group of players who believe in each other and never stop running. This is our season, told in full.
